lines.speaker: Ambassador Alvijar
lines.text: Headman Ur-tag, I cannot stress enough how important it is that this train link be completed on time. The mining companies have taken out considerable loans...

lines.speaker: Ur-tag
lines.text: I understand your concerns, Ambassador, but you must realise that the discoveries must change the whole schedule. To remove them too hurriedly would be a crime against knowledge.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What are you talking about?

lines.speaker: Ur-tag
lines.text: It's the new underground train link being built between our city and the dwarven city of Keldagrim.

lines.speaker: Ambassador Alvijar
lines.text: Shh! What if they're a human spy come to steal our engineering secrets?

lines.speaker: Ambassador Alvijar
lines.text: It will be the pinnacle of dwarven engineering! A great leap forward from the old steam-powered minecarts! A monument to the power and ingenuity of the Consortium!

lines.speaker: Ambassador Alvijar
lines.text: And it would be finished by now, except that they found some old goblin bones they want to dig up.

lines.speaker: Ur-tag
lines.text: We've unearthed some very important artefacts that were buried during the Dorgeshuun Civil War. They could shed important light on our history.

lines.speaker: Ur-tag
lines.text: [player name], do you have any experience with archaeology?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I passed my archaeology exam at the Digsite!

lines.speaker: Ur-tag
lines.text: Excellent! We have not had a major archaeological project for generations, so if you could give us some help we would appreciate it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd love to help!

lines.speaker: Ur-tag
lines.text: Splendid! The path to the train tunnel is in the south- west of the city.

lines.speaker: Ambassador Alvijar
lines.text: Perhaps now we can get this finished quickly and get on with laying the tracks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do your own digging!

lines.speaker: Ur-tag
lines.text: Oh well. We will continue at our own pace.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What can I do in the city?

lines.speaker: Ur-tag
lines.text: Why don't you visit the market? I hear there is quite a craze for surface foods at the moment, so you might be able to sell something there.

lines.speaker: Ur-tag
lines.text: You might also want to visit the caves to the south of the city. There are many monsters to fight there, and Zanik apparently found ways to cross over their heads!

lines.speaker: Ambassador Alvijar
lines.text: Headman Ur-tag, I cannot stress enough how important it is that this train link be completed on time. The mining companies have taken out considerable loans...

lines.speaker: Ur-tag
lines.text: I understand your concerns, Ambassador, but you must realise that the discoveries must change the whole schedule. To remove them too hurriedly would be a crime against knowledge.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why did you decide to open the city?

lines.speaker: Ur-tag
lines.text: For trade, and for fostering goodwill between races! I am sure that it will benefit both our races.

lines.speaker: Ambassador Alvijar
lines.text: Headman Ur-tag, I cannot stress enough how important it is that this train link be completed on time. The mining companies have taken out considerable loans...

lines.speaker: Ur-tag
lines.text: I understand your concerns, Ambassador, but you must realise that the discoveries must change the whole schedule. To remove them too hurriedly would be a crime against knowledge.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: May I have permission to sell food in the market?

lines.speaker: Ur-tag
lines.text: Of course you can.

lines.speaker: Ambassador Alvijar
lines.text: Headman Ur-tag, I cannot stress enough how important it is that this train link be completed on time. The mining companies have taken out considerable loans...

lines.speaker: Ur-tag
lines.text: I understand your concerns, Ambassador, but you must realise that the discoveries must change the whole schedule. To remove them too hurriedly would be a crime against knowledge.

lines.text: It's the new underground train link being built between our city and the dwarven city of Keldagrim.

lines.speaker: Ambassador Alvijar
lines.text: Shh! What if they're a human spy come to steal our engineering secrets?

lines.speaker: Ambassador Alvijar
lines.text: It will be the pinnacle of dwarven engineering! A great leap forward from the old steam-powered minecarts! A monument to the power and ingenuity of the Consortium!

lines.speaker: Ambassador Alvijar
lines.text: And it would be finished by now, except that they found some old goblin bones they want to dig up.

lines.speaker: Ur-tag
lines.text: We've unearthed some very important artefacts that were buried during the Dorgeshuun Civil War. They could shed important light on our history.

lines.speaker: Ur-tag
lines.text: [player name], do you have any experience with archaeology?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I passed my archaeology exam at the Digsite!

lines.speaker: Ur-tag
lines.text: Excellent! We have not had a major archaeological project for generations, so if you could give us some help we would appreciate it.

lines.speaker: Ur-tag
lines.text: Greetings, surface-dweller. Welcome to Dorgesh-Kaan.
